text.title: Team Development Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the team-development methodology converts inputs into a valid `spec` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: stable=true → charter_present=true → skill_matrix_present=true → diagnose stage = Norming → facilitate to Performing.
